subcodes.first_line: Praise is befitting and worthy of the Desired One, Who hath infused the epistle of His chosen ones with the essence of the Water of Life, inasmuch as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که در نامه اولیای خود اثر ماء حیوان گذاشته چه که
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power of prayer
